productDisplayName: Arrow Sport Men Striped Brown T-shirt
description: Composition Brown polo T-shirt with green stripes, made of 2/60 mercerised cotton, has a ribbed collar, buttoned chest placket, short sleeves with ribbed hems, embroidered brand collection on the left chest and a vented hem Fitting Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash with cold water using a non-chlorine detergent Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry low Dry inside out in shade Medium heat steam iron do not iron on decorations Don that sporty look in ease with this striped polo neck T-shirt from the arrow tailored collection. Crafted from mercerised cotton and designed for style, this tee offers exemplary comfort and is sure to become a wardrobe favourite. Team it with jeans and sports shoes. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height: 6', Shoulders: 18"
